lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਹਰਿ ਪੀਵਤੇ ਸਦਾ ਥਿਰੁ ਥੀਵਤੇ ਬਿਖੈ ਬਨੁ ਫੀਕਾ ਜਾਨਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: amrit har peevate sadaa thir theevate bikhai ban feekaa jaaniaa |
lines.english: They drink in the Lord's Ambrosial Nectar, and become eternally stable. They know that the water of corruption is insipid and tasteless.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਏ ਕਿਰਪਾਲ ਗੋਪਾਲ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਮੇਰੇ ਸਾਧਸੰਗਤਿ ਨਿਧਿ ਮਾਨਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: bhe kirapaal gopaal prabh mere saadhasangat nidh maaniaa |
lines.english: When my God, the Lord of the Universe became merciful, I came to look upon the Saadh Sangat as the treasure.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਰਬਸੋ ਸੂਖ ਆਨੰਦ ਘਨ ਪਿਆਰੇ ਹਰਿ ਰਤਨੁ ਮਨ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਸੀਵਤੇ ॥
lines.translit: sarabaso sookh aanand ghan piaare har ratan man antar seevate |
lines.english: All pleasures and supreme ecstasy, O my Beloved, come to those who sew the Jewel of the Lord into their minds.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕੁ ਤਿਲੁ ਨਹੀ ਵਿਸਰੈ ਪ੍ਰਾਨ ਆਧਾਰਾ ਜਪਿ ਜਪਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਜੀਵਤੇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: eik til nahee visarai praan aadhaaraa jap jap naanak jeevate |3|
lines.english: They do not forget, even for an instant, the Support of the breath of life. They live by constantly meditating on Him, O Nanak. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਡਖਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: ddakhanaa |
lines.english: Dakhanaa:

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਹੀ ਆਪਿ ਮੋਹਿਓਹੁ ਜਸੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਆਪਿ ਸੁਣਿਓਹਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: aape hee aap mohiohu jas naanak aap suniohi |1|
lines.english: You Yourself are entranced, O Nanak, hearing Your Own Praises. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਤਉ ਕੀਨੇ ਆਪਣੇ ਤਿਨਾ ਕੂੰ ਮਿਲਿਓਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: jo tau keene aapane tinaa koon miliohi |
lines.english: O Lord, You meet and merge with those whom you have made Your Own.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰੇਮ ਠਗਉਰੀ ਪਾਇ ਰੀਝਾਇ ਗੋਬਿੰਦ ਮਨੁ ਮੋਹਿਆ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: prem tthgauree paae reejhaae gobind man mohiaa jeeo |
lines.english: Administering the intoxicating drug of love, I have won over the Lord of the Universe; I have fascinated His Mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਛੰਤੁ ॥
lines.translit: chhant |
lines.english: Chhant:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤਨ ਕੈ ਪਰਸਾਦਿ ਅਗਾਧਿ ਕੰਠੇ ਲਗਿ ਸੋਹਿਆ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: santan kai parasaad agaadh kantthe lag sohiaa jeeo |
lines.english: By the Grace of the Saints, I am held in the loving embrace of the Unfathomable Lord, and I am entranced.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕੰਠਿ ਲਗਿ ਸੋਹਿਆ ਦੋਖ ਸਭਿ ਜੋਹਿਆ ਭਗਤਿ ਲਖੵਣ ਕਰਿ ਵਸਿ ਭਏ ॥
lines.translit: har kantth lag sohiaa dokh sabh johiaa bhagat lakhayan kar vas bhe |
lines.english: Held in the Lord's loving embrace, I look beautiful, and all my pains have been dispelled. By the loving worship of His devotees, the Lord has come under their power.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਿ ਸਰਬ ਸੁਖ ਵੁਠੇ ਗੋਵਿਦ ਤੁਠੇ ਜਨਮ ਮਰਣਾ ਸਭਿ ਮਿਟਿ ਗਏ ॥
lines.translit: man sarab sukh vutthe govid tutthe janam maranaa sabh mitt ge |
lines.english: All pleasures have come to dwell in the mind; the Lord of the Universe is pleased and appeased. Birth and death have been totally eliminated.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਖੀ ਮੰਗਲੋ ਗਾਇਆ ਇਛ ਪੁਜਾਇਆ ਬਹੁੜਿ ਨ ਮਾਇਆ ਹੋਹਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: sakhee mangalo gaaeaa ichh pujaaeaa bahurr na maaeaa hohiaa |
lines.english: O my companions, sing the Songs of Joy. My desires have been fulfilled, and I shall never again be trapped or shaken by Maya.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰੁ ਗਹਿ ਲੀਨੇ ਨਾਨਕ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਪਿਆਰੇ ਸੰਸਾਰੁ ਸਾਗਰੁ ਨਹੀ ਪੋਹਿਆ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: kar geh leene naanak prabh piaare sansaar saagar nahee pohiaa |4|
lines.english: Taking hold of my hand, O Nanak, my Beloved God will not let me be swallowed up by the world-ocean. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਡਖਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: ddakhanaa |
lines.english: Dakhanaa:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਈ ਨਾਮੁ ਅਮੋਲੁ ਕੀਮ ਨ ਕੋਈ ਜਾਣਦੋ ॥
lines.translit: saaee naam amol keem na koee jaanado |
lines.english: The Master's Name is Priceless; no one knows its value.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਾ ਭਾਗ ਮਥਾਹਿ ਸੇ ਨਾਨਕ ਹਰਿ ਰੰਗੁ ਮਾਣਦੋ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jinaa bhaag mathaeh se naanak har rang maanado |1|
lines.english: Those who have good destiny recorded upon their foreheads, O Nanak, enjoy the Love of the Lord. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਛੰਤੁ ॥
lines.translit: chhant |
lines.english: Chhant:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨ ਕਉ ਸਾਧੂ ਸੰਗੁ ਨਾਮ ਹਰਿ ਰੰਗੁ ਤਿਨੀ ਬ੍ਰਹਮੁ ਬੀਚਾਰਿਆ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: jin kau saadhoo sang naam har rang tinee braham beechaariaa jeeo |
lines.english: Those who join the Saadh Sangat are imbued with the Lord's Love; they reflect and meditate on God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹਤੇ ਪਵਿਤ੍ਰ ਸੁਣਤੇ ਸਭਿ ਧੰਨੁ ਲਿਖਤਂ‍ੀ ਕੁਲੁ ਤਾਰਿਆ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: kahate pavitr sunate sabh dhan likhatanee kul taariaa jeeo |
lines.english: Those who chant are sanctified. All those who listen are blessed, and those who write save their ancestors.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬ੍ਰਹਮੁ ਬੀਚਾਰਿਆ ਜਨਮੁ ਸਵਾਰਿਆ ਪੂਰਨ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਪ੍ਰਭਿ ਕਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: braham beechaariaa janam savaariaa pooran kirapaa prabh karee |
lines.english: Contemplating God, their lives are reformed and redeemed; God has showered His Perfect Mercy upon them.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਦਇਆਲ ਕਿਰਪਾਲ ਭੇਟਤ ਹਰੇ ਕਾਮੁ ਕ੍ਰੋਧੁ ਲੋਭੁ ਮਾਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: satigur deaal kirapaal bhettat hare kaam krodh lobh maariaa |
lines.english: Through the Kind and Compassionate True Guru, I have met the Lord; I have conquered sexual desire, anger and greed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰੁ ਗਹਿ ਲੀਨੇ ਹਰਿ ਜਸੋ ਦੀਨੇ ਜੋਨਿ ਨਾ ਧਾਵੈ ਨਹ ਮਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: kar geh leene har jaso deene jon naa dhaavai neh maree |
lines.english: Taking them by the hand, the Lord has blessed them with His Praises. They no longer have to wander in reincarnation, and they never have to die.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਥਨੁ ਨ ਜਾਇ ਅਕਥੁ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਸਦਕੈ ਜਾਇ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਵਾਰਿਆ ॥੫॥੧॥੩॥
lines.translit: kathan na jaae akath suaamee sadakai jaae naanak vaariaa |5|1|3|
lines.english: Our Indescribable Lord and Master cannot be described. Nanak is devoted, forever a sacrifice to Him. ||5||1||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar sat naam gur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. Truth Is The Name. By Guru's Grace:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਰੀਰਾਗੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੪ ਵਣਜਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: sireeraag mahalaa 4 vanajaaraa |
lines.english: Siree Raag, Fourth Mehl, Vanajaaraa ~ The Merchant:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਉਤਮੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਹੈ ਜਿਨਿ ਸਿਰਿਆ ਸਭੁ ਕੋਇ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: har har utam naam hai jin siriaa sabh koe jeeo |
lines.english: The Name of the Lord, Har, Har, is Excellent and Sublime. He created everyone.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਜੀਅ ਸਭੇ ਪ੍ਰਤਿਪਾਲਦਾ ਘਟਿ ਘਟਿ ਰਮਈਆ ਸੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: har jeea sabhe pratipaaladaa ghatt ghatt rameea soe |
lines.english: The Lord cherishes all beings. He permeates each and every heart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਮੋਹਿ ਮਾਇਆ ਚਿਤੁ ਲਾਇਦੇ ਸੇ ਛੋਡਿ ਚਲੇ ਦੁਖੁ ਰੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: jo mohi maaeaa chit laaeide se chhodd chale dukh roe |
lines.english: Those who focus their consciousness on emotional attachment to Maya must leave; they depart crying out in despair.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਹਰਿ ਸਦਾ ਧਿਆਈਐ ਤਿਸੁ ਬਿਨੁ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: so har sadaa dhiaaeeai tis bin avar na koe |
lines.english: Meditate forever on that Lord. Without Him, there is no other at all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੈ ਹਰਿ ਬਿਨੁ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: mai har bin avar na koe |
lines.english: I have none other than You, O Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਇਆ ਹਰਿ ਅੰਤਿ ਸਖਾਈ ਹੋਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jan naanak naam dhiaaeaa har ant sakhaaee hoe |1|
lines.english: Servant Nanak meditates on the Naam, the Name of the Lord, his only Companion in the end. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਗੁਰ ਸਰਣਾਈ ਪਾਈਐ ਵਣਜਾਰਿਆ ਮਿਤ੍ਰਾ ਵਡਭਾਗਿ ਪਰਾਪਤਿ ਹੋਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: har gur saranaaee paaeeai vanajaariaa mitraa vaddabhaag paraapat hoe |1| rahaau |
lines.english: In the Guru's Sanctuary, the Lord is found, O my merchant friend; by great good fortune, He is obtained. ||1||Pause||
